flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Community College of Denver rose 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.2k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Community College of Denver fell 17% between 2009 and 2010 (8.5% → 7.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Denver fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Community College of Denver rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (18.0% → 20.0%).
